items.title: [HCMC, Onsite] AI DATA PYTHON
items.description:
📍 Location: HB Tower, 699 Điện Biên Phủ Street, Ward 25, Bình Thạnh District, HCMC
 ⏰ Working Hours:
Monday – Friday: 08:30 – 18:00 (Lunch break: 12:00 – 13:30)


Saturday: 08:30 – 12:30 (Work From Home)
 👤 Direct Manager: Project Manager / Senior Management



Overview
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated AI/ML Engineer to join our AI Assistant Platform team.
In this role, you will design, develop, and deploy advanced AI/ML models and services that power intelligent features, natural language processing, and real-time inference.
You’ll collaborate closely with platform engineers, data scientists, and cloud architects to ensure AI solutions are scalable, reliable, and deeply integrated into our intelligent applications.

Key Responsibilities
Design and develop scalable AI/ML solutions and production-ready models for core AI Assistant capabilities (e.g., natural language understanding, generation).
Own the end-to-end lifecycle of AI/ML models, from initial experimentation and training to testing, validation, and deployment in production environments.
Architect and optimize ML infrastructure across distributed cloud environments (AWS, GCP, or Azure) to support high-throughput, low-latency inference.
Implement robust model monitoring, versioning, and performance optimization frameworks (e.g., drift detection, A/B testing) to maintain model integrity and quality.
Partner with backend engineers to integrate AI/ML services with the AI Assistant core platform.
Enforce model fairness, security, and performance best practices across the entire ML lifecycle.
Required Skills & Qualifications
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or a related quantitative field.
2+ years of experience in AI/ML engineering, machine learning, or software development with a strong focus on AI.
Proficiency in Python and popular ML libraries (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn) for model development and prototyping.
Strong experience with MLOps practices and tools (e.g., MLflow, Kubeflow, Sagemaker) for automating the model development and deployment pipeline.
Deep understanding of machine learning algorithms, model training, and evaluation techniques.
Experience with cloud-based compute and ML services (e.g., AWS SageMaker, Google AI Platform, Azure ML).
Expertise in productionizing and scaling AI/ML models in a high-traffic, low-latency production environment.
Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
Preferred Qualifications
Proven experience with Large Language Models (LLMs), Natural Language Processing (NLP), or Computer Vision applications.
Hands-on experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, and fine-tuning LLMs.
Knowledge of containerization and orchestration tools (Docker, Kubernetes).
Ability to work cross-functionally in Agile or fast-paced R&D environments.
Good to have experienced with Agentic AI application.
Why Join Us
Play a pivotal role in building the AI models and services for a next-generation AI Assistant Platform.
Collaborate with a world-class team of AI, data, and platform engineers on cutting-edge technologies.
Contribute to a scalable architecture that supports real-time AI experiences across industries.
What We Offer
💰 Competitive salary & performance-based bonus + 13th-month salary + holiday/Tết bonuses.
🏥 Healthcare Insurance.
💻 Modern equipment (MacBook, iPhone).
🎯 Team building, Happy Hours, dynamic and young work environment.
📚 Clear career path with opportunities for professional development.
📩 Apply Now
Email: hr@gontech.asia

items.title: [HCMC, Onsite] Senior Backend Developer Python
items.description:
Senior Backend Engineer (Python)
📍 Location: Bình Thạnh, Ho Chi Minh City
 🕒 Working model: Full-time
 👤 Reports to: Tech Lead / Engineering Manager

 Job Summary
We are looking for a highly skilled Senior Backend Engineer (Python) to join our engineering team. You will play a key role in designing, building, and optimizing backend systems that are scalable, secure, maintainable, and aligned with long-term product strategy.
 You will also mentor junior engineers, participate in architectural discussions, and contribute to solving complex technical challenges across the platform.

 Responsibilities
Take full ownership and show strong commitment to every task, from development to deployment
Proactively report progress, and planned tasks, and blockers to the team.


Work closely with Design, Frontend, and QC teams to deliver features that meet both business and technical requirements.


Ensure high code quality by following Clean Code, linting standards, Conventional Commit rules, and ensuring all QC test cases are passed.


System Design & Development
Design, build, and optimize backend architecture for scalability, performance, security, maintainability, and reliability.


Develop and maintain RESTful APIs, WebSocket, and Server-sent Event
Participate in system improvement initiatives and contribute ideas for architectural enhancement.


Leadership & Mentorship
Review code, provide feedback, and mentor junior/mid-level engineers.


Share best practices, guidelines, and technical knowledge with the team.



 Requirements
Education
Bachelor’s degree or currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Students are welcome to apply


Experience


Ability to read and apply English technical documentation.


Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments is a plus.
Having experience in building, maintaining and operating AI applications is a plus"
Technical Skills
Strong experience with Python, Django, FastAPI and familiarity with modern AI-assisted development tools.


Solid understanding of software design principles:


OOP, Design Patterns


Event-driven Architecture


Microservices


Message Queue systems


Clean Architecture


Database experience:


MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis


schema design, query optimization, indexing, performance tuning


Hands-on experience with:


RESTFul API, or GraphQL API, or gRPC API development


Websocket/Server-sent event


Git, Docker, CI/CD pipelines


Unit testing frameworks: pytest, unittest


Message queues: RabbitMQ, Kafka, Azure Service Bus


Strong understanding of backend security and performance best practices.



 Nice to Have


Packaging & distribution experience: seed data, licensing/subscriptions, install wizards.


Integration experience with datamart/reporting systems: ClickHouse, Metabase, Power BI.


Strong understanding of web security (OWASP ASVS), RBAC/SoD, object-level permission models.


🔹 Benefits
  Salary : Up to $1500 
 85% salary during probation.


 Attractive salary package, including 13th-month bonus.


 Provided with MacBook & iPhone 16e.


 Premium healthcare package.


 Monthly Happy Hour & annual company trips.


 Opportunity to improve English skills with international clients.


 Exposure to new tech stacks for business growth.


 Flexible working hours & attractive annual leave policy.



📩 Apply Now
 Zalo :+84 966 012 405
 Email: hr@gontech.asia
 Please specify [POSITION] + [FULL NAME] in the email subject line.

items.title: Senior Software Engineer (Python), HCMC
items.description:
Gia nhập công ty 𝗔𝗜 𝗦𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘁𝘂𝗽 của Mỹ đang mở rộng team nhân sự tại Việt Nam (Hiện tại team đã có 8 ae rồi). Nếu bạn tìm kiếm môi trường có văn hóa mở, không control thời gian mà tập trung vào chất lượng làm việc thì đây chính là chân ái rồi!!!
## 👉 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗲𝗿:
- Location: HCMC (full office, sắp xếp remote khi có việc)
- 𝗦𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗿𝘆 𝘂𝗽 𝘁𝗼 $𝟱,𝟬𝟬𝟬 𝗻𝗲𝘁 (không thuế + BHXH) 
- Allowance $10/ bữa trưa công ty chi trả
## 👉 𝗖𝗮́𝗰 𝘃𝗶̣ 𝘁𝗿𝗶́ đ𝗮𝗻𝗴 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 (𝗟𝗮𝗻𝗴𝘂𝗮𝗴𝗲: 𝗙𝗹𝘂𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝘂𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻)
(𝟭) 𝗦𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗼𝗿 𝗦𝗼𝗳𝘁𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗿 (𝗣𝘆𝘁𝗵𝗼𝗻)
- Strong experience designing and building complex software systems using Python
- Hands-on experience using AI development tools such as GitHub Copilot, Claude, ChatGPT, or Cursor to boost productivity
- Strong Python programming skills with clean, efficient, and maintainable coding practices
Solid understanding of software engineering principles, practices, and development methodologies
- Experience working with cloud platforms such as Azure or AWS
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
- Excellent communication and teamwork abilities
- Self-motivated learner who stays up to date with emerging technologies.
(𝟮) 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗱-𝗗𝗲𝗽𝗹𝗼𝘆𝗲𝗱 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗿 (𝗖𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗿-𝗙𝗮𝗰𝗶𝗻𝗴, 𝗡𝗼𝗻-𝗘𝗺𝗯𝗲𝗱𝗱𝗲𝗱)
- Strong software engineering background (Python or TypeScript preferred). 
- Experience with distributed systems, data pipelines, APIs, and system integration. 
- Ability to communicate clearly with customer engineering and domain teams. 
- Comfortable working across multiple customer accounts with structured engagement cycles. 
- Familiarity with AI/ML, agent architectures, or semantic/ontology modeling is a plus. 
## 📩 Interested or know someone who might be a fit? Let’s connect!
💬 LinkedIn DM or Zalo / Telegram / WhatsApp: 0915 500 810

items.title: [aw] No-Op Runs
items.description:
This issue tracks all no-op runs from agentic workflows in this repository. Each workflow run that completes with a no-op message (indicating no action was needed) posts a comment here.
📘 What is a No-Op? A no-op (no operation) occurs when an agentic workflow runs successfully but determines that no action is required. For example: - A security scanner that finds no issues - An update checker that finds nothing to update - A monitoring workflow that finds everything is healthy These are successful outcomes, not failures, and help provide transparency into workflow behavior.
🎯 How This Helps This issue helps you: - Track workflows that ran but determined no action was needed - Distinguish between failures and intentional no-ops - Monitor workflow health by seeing when workflows decide not to act
📚 Resources - [GitHub Agentic Workflows Documentation](https://github.com/github/gh-aw)
> [!TIP] > To stop a workflow from posting here, set `report-as-issue: false` in its frontmatter: > ```yaml > safe-outputs: > noop: > report-as-issue: false > ``` --- > This issue is automatically managed by GitHub Agentic Workflows. Do not close this issue manually. > > **No action to take** - Do not assign to an agent. > - [x] expires on Apr 9, 2026, 9:31 PM UTC

items.title: [Job] Senior Backend Engineer (+10 YOE) - Remote (Brazil South/Southeast Only) - Paid in USD 🚀
items.description:
[Job] Senior Backend Engineer (+10 YOE) - Remote (Brazil South/Southeast Only) - Paid in USD 🚀

📍 Location & Eligibility
100% Remote
Must be based in the South or Southeast regions of Brazil (PR, SC, RS, SP, RJ, MG, ES).
Fluent English is mandatory for global collaboration.

🏢 The Mission: Ownership & Scale
We are looking for a battle-tested ### Senior Backend Engineer with over 10 years of experience. At this level, we aren't just looking for someone who writes code; we need an engineer who can deliver reliable, secure, and observable services—and truly ### own them in production.

If you believe in ### simplicity over over-engineering and have the "operational muscle" to handle systems at scale, we want to talk to you.

🎯 What You Will Do

- Design & Implement: Architect backend services and APIs with a focus on long-term maintainability and pragmatic simplicity.
- Data Strategy: Work effectively across both SQL and NoSQL environments, choosing the right data models and storage technologies for specific problems.
- Quality First: Build robust automated testing (unit, integration, e2e), ensuring CI/CD readiness and implementing safe rollout patterns.
- Operational Excellence: Own the full lifecycle—logs, metrics, traces, and alerting. Participate in on-call support when needed and drive post-incident improvements.

✅ Strong Signals (Requirements)

- Experience: 10+ years of solid backend engineering experience.
- Communication: Fluent English (written and spoken) is mandatory.
- Pragmatism: You make architectural decisions based on business value, delivering in small, continuous increments.
- Automation Mindset: You proactively identify and reduce manual bottlenecks through automation.
- Location: Residing in the South or Southeast of Brazil is a requirement for this role.

💰 Benefits

100% Remote: Full flexibility to work from home.
USD Compensation: Competitive salary paid in US Dollars (high purchasing power in Brazil).
High Autonomy: Direct impact on technical decisions without micromanagement.

📝 How to Apply

Please send your LinkedIn profile, GitHub, or Resume to [psicomatheuspedroza@gmail.com](mailto:psicomatheuspedroza@gmail.com) with the subject: "Senior Backend Engineer - Brazil SE/S - [Your Name]

items.title: [新竹/竹科] [月薪 10 萬起] [年薪 200 萬起] 聯發科技資深解決方案架構師
items.description:
# Solution Architect（解決方案架構師）

> AI Coding Era｜Golang + Python｜Senior Level｜Full-Time｜新竹

---

## 關於此職位 About the Role

我們正處於 AI Coding 浪潮的核心，正在尋找一位思維前沿的 Solution Architect，協助帶領工程團隊設計高效能、可擴展的系統架構。你將扮演「架構領航者」，橋接業務需求與工程實作，並在 AI-assisted development 時代建立最佳實踐框架。

| 項目     | 說明                                |
| -------- | ----------------------------------- |
| 工作地點 | 新竹                                |
| 薪資範圍 | 100K/month 以上                      |

---

## 工作職責 Key Responsibilities

### 系統架構設計

- 主導核心系統的整體架構設計，確保高可用性、可擴展性與可維護性
- 設計 Golang 微服務架構（gRPC / REST），制定服務間溝通規範
- 規劃 Python AI/ML Pipeline 架構，整合至主體後端服務
- 制定 API Gateway、Service Mesh、事件驅動架構的設計標準

### AI Coding 與研發效率

- 建立 AI-assisted coding 規範（Claude Code / Gemini / OpenCode 等工具的最佳使用流程）
- 設計 AI Code Review 流程，確保 AI 生成程式碼的品質與安全性
- 規劃 RAG / LLM 整合架構，協助產品嵌入 AI 能力
- 評估並導入 AI 工具鏈，持續提升團隊開發速度

### 技術治理與跨團隊協作

- 擔任技術決策的把關者，參與 Architecture Review Board (ARB)
- 與 Product、Data、DevOps 團隊密切合作，推動技術方案落地
- 撰寫架構設計文件（ADR）、技術規範，建立知識庫
- Mentor 資深工程師，推動技術文化建設

---

## 任職要求 Requirements

### 必要條件

- 8 年以上軟體開發經驗，其中 3 年以上擔任架構師或資深技術領導
- 精通 Golang：熟悉 goroutine、channel、效能優化；有大規模生產環境經驗
- 具備 Python 開發能力：AI/ML 框架整合（FastAPI、LangChain、PyTorch）經驗優先
- 深入理解分散式系統設計：CAP 理論、一致性模型、分散式事務
- 熟悉雲端架構（AWS / GCP / Azure），具備 IaC（Terraform / Pulumi）實戰經驗
- 具備 Kubernetes、Service Mesh（Istio / Linkerd）、觀測性工具（OpenTelemetry）實務經驗

### 加分條件

- 實際使用過 Claude Code / Gemini / OpenCode 等 AI Coding 工具，並有團隊推廣經驗
- 有 LLM 應用架構設計經驗（RAG、Agent、Function Calling）
- 開源貢獻或技術社群分享（演講、文章、GitHub 專案）
- 具備 CNCF 生態系相關認證（CKA / CKS / CKAD）

---

## 我們提供 What We Offer

| 薪酬與福利                | 成長與文化                                             |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
| 具競爭力的薪資 + 績效獎金 | AI 工具授權全額補助（Claude Code / Gemini / OpenCode） |
| 彈性工時                  | 高自主度的技術決策空間                                 |
| 年度健康檢查與醫療補助    | 扁平化組織，快速成長機會                               |

---

## 面試流程 Interview Process

| 階段 | 形式         | 說明                                     |
| ---- | ------------ | ---------------------------------------- |
| 01   | 技術面試     | 系統設計與架構討論，深入評估技術深度     |
| 02   | 處長面試     | 與部門主管進行職涯方向與領導力交流       |
| 03   | HR Screening | 了解背景、動機與薪資期望，確認整體契合度 |

---

> 📩 請將履歷與 Portfolio 寄至 **bo-yi.wu@mediatek.com**，標題是『**應徵 Solution Architect (XXXX 中文姓名)**』

items.title: REMOTO - DEV FULLSTACK SÊNIOR (JAVA + REACT / REACT NATIVE) - CLT - 26177
items.description:
Estamos em busca em Desenvolvedor(a) Fullstack para projetar, desenvolver e manter APIs RESTful em Java (17+/21+) com Spring Boot. Profissional atuará na construção de soluções escaláveis e seguras, com foco em qualidade de código, testes automatizados e integração com infra/DevOps.

Responsabilidades:

— Projetar, desenvolver e manter APIs RESTful utilizando Java e Spring Boot.
— Implementar soluções escaláveis, seguras e testáveis alinhadas aos requisitos de negócio.
— Escrever código limpo, eficiente e realizar code reviews.
— Criar e manter testes automatizados (unitários, de integração e funcionais) com JUnit/Mockito.
— Modelar e otimizar consultas em bancos relacionais (Postgres, MySQL, Oracle) e NoSQL (MongoDB).
— Utilizar ORM (Hibernate / JPA) para persistência de dados.
— Desenvolver integrações com serviços externos via APIs e mensageria (Kafka, RabbitMQ).
— Implementar mecanismos de autenticação/autorização (OAuth2, JWT).
— Monitorar e otimizar performance, identificar gargalos e propor soluções de escalabilidade.
— Participar da definição arquitetural e evolução para microsserviços quando aplicável.
— Colaborar com DevOps para CI/CD e deploy em Docker, Kubernetes e cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP).
— Documentar APIs, decisões técnicas e colaborar com frontend, produto e QA.

Requisitos técnicos:

— Domínio de Java 21+ e experiência com Spring Boot, Spring MVC e Spring Security.
— Experiência com frontend: React e/ou React Native (diferencial / atuação fullstack).
— SQL avançado (Postgres, MySQL, Oracle) e familiaridade com NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis).
— Experiência com mensageria (Kafka, RabbitMQ).
— Testes automatizados: JUnit, Mockito; práticas de TDD.
— Conhecimento em Docker e Kubernetes; experiência com AWS, Azure ou GCP.
— Monitoramento/observability: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK (ou similares).
— Experiência com Git e metodologias ágeis (Scrum / Kanban).

Diferenciais:

— Experiência com GitOps (ArgoCD/Flux).
— Certificações Java, Spring ou Cloud.
— Experiência com performance tuning e testes de carga.
— Experiência prévia em ambientes de microsserviços em larga escala.

Informações adicionais:

Modelo: Remoto
Horário: comercial - 09H AS 18H
Contratação: CLT

items.title: [Remoto] Arquiteto de software Pleno na Spun
items.description:
**[Clique aqui para se inscrever!](https://spun.inhire.app/vagas/1a1950ca-def1-4ede-8945-cfdce2b7ef6f/arquiteto-de-software-pleno)**


Olá!
É um prazer contar com sua participação no processo seletivo da SPUN. 💚
Agradecemos o interesse em conhecer nosso time. Abaixo estão as principais informações sobre a vaga:
Buscamos uma pessoa para atuar como Arquiteto de Software Pleno em nosso time. 

Contratação: PJ/MEI 

Valor Mensal do Contrato: R$12.000,00 a 14.000,00

**Requisitos**:
Experiência em desenho e evolução de arquiteturas de sistemas complexos, garantindo escalabilidade, segurança e manutenibilidade.
Experiência comprovada em desenvolvimento em PHP Laravel.
Conhecimento em tecnologias emergentes, frameworks em python.
Boas práticas de desenvolvimento utilizando IA.
Experiência em ambientes com múltiplas squads/projetos e integração entre serviços.
Capacidade de arquitetar soluções tanto para servidores on-premise/VPS (infra local ou tradicional) quanto para ambientes em nuvem (especialmente GCP), avaliando trade-offs entre as abordagens.
Capacidade de definir padrões de arquitetura e requisitos não funcionais (segurança, performance, observabilidade) juntos aos demais sêniores do time.
Experiência em sistemas distribuídos, APIs e integração entre serviços.
Habilidade em modelagem de domínio e dados (DDD ou equivalentes).
Capacidade de liderar decisões técnicas e comunicar trade-offs.
Conhecimento sólido de fundamentos de engenharia de software (design, redes, segurança, bancos de dados)

**Diferenciais**:
Participação em projetos de modernização de legado ou migração para arquiteturas modernas (ex.: microserviços, event-driven).
Vivência em estratégias híbridas de infraestrutura (migração gradual de on-premise para cloud).
Certificações em arquitetura ou cloud (ex.: AWS Solutions Architect, TOGAF).

**Responsabilidades:**
Definir e evoluir a visão e padrões de arquitetura da empresa, alinhados ao negócio e à estratégia de longo prazo.
Projetar soluções escaláveis, seguras e resilientes para sistemas novos e existentes.
Garantir requisitos não funcionais (disponibilidade, segurança, observabilidade e custos) em todas as soluções.
Liderar discussões técnicas e orientar decisões de trade-off entre inovação e legado.
Mentorar tech leads e desenvolvedores, promovendo alinhamento arquitetural entre squads.
Apoiar a modernização de sistemas e a integração de novos produtos/serviços.
Participar de revisões de design e analisar riscos técnicos.
Estabelecer padrões de documentação e governança técnica.
Benefícios:
 
💻 Trabalho 100% remoto, modelo de entregas com disponibilidade combinada.
💳 Cartão CAJU: Receba 15% do valor mensal do contrato para usar em categorias como Home Office, Cultura, Mobilidade, Saúde e Educação.
🛡️ Seguro de Vida: Tranquilidade e proteção garantida para você e seus familiares;
📚 Aulas de inglês: Turmas abertas semestralmente para aprimorar seu aprendizado;
🏋️‍♂️ Auxílio atividade física: Incentivo para manter sua saúde e bem-estar;
🎯 Consultoria de treino: Turmas abertas periodicamente com especialistas para potencializar seus resultados;
📢 Treinamentos e palestras: Conteúdos exclusivos para o seu desenvolvimento profissional e pessoal.

• Experiência com submissão de apps nas lojas (Apple / Google)

items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: 
Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios.

Estamos em busca de uma pessoa Desenvolvedora Full Cycle para integrar nosso time de tecnologia! 
Se você é apaixonado por tecnologia, adora desafios e quer construir o futuro da logística conosco, essa oportunidade é para você!
Responsabilidades:

Participar de todas as etapas do ciclo de desenvolvimento, desde a modelagem inicial da solução até o acompanhamento em produção;
Trabalhar de ponta a ponta, colaborando com equipes multidisciplinares para entregar soluções inovadoras e de alto impacto;
Contribuir para a transformação digital da logística, elevando o padrão de qualidade e eficiência em nossos processos.
## BeTruck: 
 • Colaboramos muito, uns com os outros. Troca de conhecimento é o nosso lema, e geramos crescimento e inovação;• Nosso time é dinâmico e ágil;• Temos autonomia e liberdade para propor soluções e exercer nossa criatividade;• Idéias? Claro! São muito bem-vindas;• O bom humor e a leveza estão sempre presentes por aqui, acredite;• Respeitamos os prazos e a qualidade das entregas! PROCURAMOS ALGUÉM QUE:• Queira aprender coisas novas e seja apaixonado por desafios;• Seja focado e proativo;• Possuir pensamento lógico;• Trabalhe com dinamismo e agilidade e goste de entregar resultados; Aqui na BeTruck, você conhece e participa de todo o projeto, não apenas de uma fatia. Cresce e aprende muito!!

items.title: [Hibrido / São Paulo, Brasil] Analista de Dados - Afirmativa para PCD na Coodesh
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/analista-de-negocios-afirmativa-para-pcd-122422707?utm_source=github&utm_medium=programadores-br-geral&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋 Estamos buscando **Analista de Dados** para uma empresa parceira. **IMPORTANTE:** Vaga Afirmativa para PCD **Responsábilidades:** * Entender os requisitos de negócios e desenvolver dashboards e relatórios utilizando plataformas de visualização de BI, com especial foco em Power BI. * Realizar a manutenção de relatórios existentes e propor melhorias contínuas para otimizar a visualização e a entrega de informações. * Utilizar aplicações analíticas para identificar tendências e relacionamentos entre diferentes conjuntos de dados, traduzindo-os em descobertas analíticas claras e impactantes. * Conduzir auditorias e monitoramento da qualidade dos dados para garantir a integridade e confiabilidade das informações. * Colaborar ativamente com diversos stakeholders, incluindo equipes de tecnologia e de negócio, para criar e aprimorar produtos de dados, garantindo o alinhamento com os objetivos estratégicos. * Atuar como P.O. (Product Owner) em projetos específicos, priorizando e gerenciando as demandas com base nos objetivos e impactos de negócio. * Avaliar novas ferramentas e tecnologias para continuamente melhorar os processos analíticos e a eficiência da área. ## Coodesh Carreiras:

Nós somos a Coodesh, uma plataforma que conecta pessoas da área de tecnologia em oportunidades 100% remotas de nossas empresas parceiras.

Em nossa plataforma você encontra posições de diversos níveis, tecnologias e modelos de contratação, de variadas empresas com diversas culturas e que oferecem diversos desafios, pensando sempre em atender as expectativas e objetivos de nossas pessoas candidatas.

Veja mais no site ## Habilidades: - Inglês - Power BI - Python - SQL/PostgreSQL - Tableau - Looker Studio ## Local: São Paulo, Brasil ## Requisitos: - Graduação em Administração, Engenharias, Economia, Estatística, Ciência da Computação ou áreas correlatas. - Experiência profissional comprovada trabalhando com dados e análises. - Português fluente e Inglês avançado (capacidade de participar de reuniões, redigir e-mails e fazer apresentações). - Forte domínio em SQL. - Proficiência em Python para análise e manipulação de dados. - Experiência sólida no desenvolvimento de dashboards utilizando Power BI, Tableau, Looker Studio ou ferramentas similares. - Experiência na manipulação de grandes conjuntos de dados e utilização de bancos de dados (preferencialmente Google Big Query). - Conhecimento em ferramentas para cruzamento de dados, como Alteryx. - Capacidade comprovada de interpretar grandes volumes de dados, realizar atividades analíticas e processuais complexas, e apresentar dados de forma clara e eficaz, atendendo às necessidades específicas dos diversos stakeholders. ## Diferenciais: - Espanhol intermediário - Experiência de trabalho em start-ups e empresas de tecnologia. - Pós-graduação ou especialização em dados. - Conhecimento e aplicação de práticas ágeis. - Conhecimentos em CRM (especialmente Salesforce). - Familiaridade com modelos preditivos, Inteligência Artificial (IA) e Aprendizado de Máquina (ML). ## Benefícios: - Serão detalhados no decorrer do processo. ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Analista de Dados - Afirmativa para PCD na Coodesh Carreiras](https://coodesh.com/jobs/analista-de-negocios-afirmativa-para-pcd-122422707?utm_source=github&utm_medium=programadores-br-geral&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Alocado #### Regime CLT #### Categoria Banco de Dados

items.title: [DEVOPS ANALYST] HEXAGON MINING- HÍBRIDO EM BH
items.description:
### 🎯 Cargo

DevOps Analyst

### 🏢 Empresa

Hexagon Mining

### 📊 Nível de Experiência

Sênior

### 🏠 Modalidade de Trabalho

Híbrido

### 📍 Localização

Belo Horizonte/MG

### 📝 Tipo de Contratação

CLT

### 💰 Faixa Salarial

_No response_

### 📋 Descrição da Vaga

**The Company:**

Hexagon is a global leader in digital reality solutions, combining sensor, software, and autonomous technologies. We are putting data to work to boost efficiency, productivity, quality, and safety across industrial, manufacturing, infrastructure, public sector, and mobility applications.
Our technologies are shaping the production and people-related ecosystems to become increasingly connected and autonomous — ensuring a scalable, sustainable future.
Hexagon’s Mining division solves surface and underground mine challenges with proven technologies for planning, operations, and safety.
Hexagon (Nasdaq Stockholm: HEXA B) has approximately 24,000 employees in 50 countries and net sales of approximately 5.5bn USD. Learn more at hexagon.com and follow us @HexagonAB.
Purpose of Position:


The DevOps Engineer will play a key role in the automation of deployment, integration, and testing for exciting mining projects. They will work with the development, support, and quality assurance teams to implement processes by which projects can be produced at scale and tested and distributed automatically. They will assist teams working on both hardware and software projects with the goal of increasing both team productivity and product quality.


**Major Areas of Responsibility:**

Implement automated Continous Integration and Continous Deployment for both hardware and software based projects
Implement test automation for both hardware and software based projects
Help with development and deployment of simulation infrastructure for testing purposes
Support hardware and software teams with DevOps responsibilities


**Knowledge and Experience - Required:**

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent;
Strong knowledge of Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment and DevOps principles;
Knowledge of test automation principles;
Knowledge of Kubernetes;
Development skills using a language such as C++, Java, or .NET;
Proficiency in scripting and automation tools such as Linux Bash, PowerShell and Python;
Knowledge of Agile development methodologies is required;
Full professional English proficiency.


**Knowledge and Experience - Desired:**

Knowledge of Atlassian Bamboo a plus
Experience with containerization and deployment using Kubernetes and Docker a plus
Relevant certifications in cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP are a plus.
Knowledge of Cybersecurity industry standards such as NIST or CIS is a plus
Relevant certifications in Cybersecurity are a plus.


**Travel:**

No travel is required.


**Benefits:**

Health plan
Comprehensive health program (psychological, nutritional, legal, financial, and social assistance)
Wellhub (Gym)
Life insurance
Meal/food allowance
Dental plan
Private pension plan


You will work on products that could revolutionize the mining industry in the next 5 years. Your colleagues consist of highly qualified and open-minded engineers from all over the world. Beside the developer career you will have the opportunity to develop into multiple directions.

Join our team as a DevOps engineer and make a significant impact on our clients' digital transformation initiatives. We offer a stimulating work environment, competitive compensation package, and opportunities for professional growth. Apply now and help shape the future of Hexagon’s technology solutions.

Hexagon is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We prohibit discrimination against any job applicant based on protected characteristic.

### ✅ Requisitos Técnicos

```markdown
**Knowledge and Experience - Required:**

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent;
Strong knowledge of Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment and DevOps principles;
Knowledge of test automation principles;
Knowledge of Kubernetes;
Development skills using a language such as C++, Java, or .NET;
Proficiency in scripting and automation tools such as Linux Bash, PowerShell and Python;
Knowledge of Agile development methodologies is required;
Full professional English proficiency.
```

### 🎁 Benefícios

Health plan
Comprehensive health program (psychological, nutritional, legal, financial, and social assistance)
Wellhub (Gym)
Life insurance
Meal/food allowance
Dental plan
Private pension plan

### 🛠️ Stack/Tecnologias

_No response_

items.title: Software Engineer
items.description:
### Link to Job Posting

https://jobs.lever.co/ivo/1629cbb2-c07c-4214-a1e2-b4e96c9cc66c

### Company Name

Ivo

### Job Title

Software Engineer

### Location

San Francisco

### Does this job offer sponsorship?

Offers Sponsorship

### Is this internship currently accepting applications?

Yes

### Email associated with your GitHub account (Optional)

_No response_

### Extra Notes (Optional)

**Engineering at Ivo**

Engineers at Ivo are inventors. Ivo was first-to-market with:
• An AI agent that lives in MS word and edits the document for you [2023]
• Ditching imprecise embeddings models in favor of agentic RAG [2023]
• Large-scale LLM-based legal fact extraction [2024]
• A legal assistant that can search large contract databases, without sacrificing accuracy [2024]
• Clustering legal documents descended from the same family [2025]
• Automatic deviation analysis to locate buried risk in huge contract databases [2025]
• Merging contracts with their amendments to make a time series of “composite” contracts (a customer actually cried when we showed her this) [2025]

**Role**
Engineers at Ivo design, create and deploy generative AI products. You’ll work across the stack on:
• Developing full stack generative AI functionality
• Shipping high performance UI code and backend systems that process and analyze millions of contracts reliably
• Designing pipelines that orchestrate LLMs, data extraction, and clustering algorithms at scale
• Collaborating with designers, lawyers and other engineers to re-imagine how lawyers work in the AI age

**Mission**
Every major business has an in-house legal team, and all of those lawyers are overworked. 80 hour weeks, tight deadlines and contract-reading death marches are the industry norm. Up until recently, there wasn’t anything technology could do to help this situation.

LLMs have given us the ability to give these lawyers their lives back, and at Ivo, that’s our mission.

We’re building an AI-native platform to automate legal drudgery. People love our software - despite high competition, we have the highest trial win rate on the market (85%). We’re genuinely improving people’s lives, and we’re only just getting started.

**Ivo might be a good fit for you if you:**

- You love writing code, but you love having impact more: We’re a team of engineers at heart, but our #1 goal is building the best possible product. That means making pragmatic choices and looking for 80/20 solutions.
- Would describe yourself as being [relentlessly resourceful](http://www.paulgraham.com/relres.html).
- You have a strong internal sense of urgency. You have a bias towards doing things *today*, rather than tomorrow.
- Experience working in a startup environment is preferred but not required.
- Are excited about the adventure of building a company!

**FAQ**

- How far along are we? We launched in early access in 2023. Since then, we’ve had an incredible response from the market and are growing rapidly. We 6x'd in ARR in the last 12 months. Our clients include companies like Uber, Reddit, IBM, Canva, Pinterest, WordPress, and more. We're happy to share more details with candidates who go through our interview process.
- Can I work remotely? We have an in-office culture, with some hybrid flexibility.
- Compensation: The USD salary range for this role is $130K-$485K. Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors, including, experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed above.
